hero.title: Moving company to and from Norway – Oslo, Bergen, Trondheim and beyond
hero.subtitle: We help Swedish families and businesses move to Norway and Norwegian customers move to Sweden. Our routine with border crossings, E6 logistics, mountain roads and Norwegian weather conditions means the move works even when distance, winter driving and toll systems put higher demands on planning.

features.title: What benefits do you get with Flyttella for moves to/from Norway?

about.title: About Flyttella for moves to and from Norway
about.desktop: Flyttella has been operating for over 8 years and helped 8,000 customers with moves in the Stockholm area and internationally. For moves to and from Norway we have built a clear specialization in border logistics, moving into Norwegian properties and coordination along the E6 corridor from Stockholm towards Oslo. We're used to everything from apartments in Grünerløkka to row houses in Bergen and houses in smaller towns with steep terrain.
about.desktop2: Our teams plan moves between Sweden and Norway with focus on winter conditions, narrow streets in Norwegian city centres and toll zones. We coordinate loading in Sweden, driving plans via border crossings such as Svinesund, time windows for arrival in the Oslo area and unloading in Norwegian properties where elevators, gates and courtyards are often shared with neighbours.
about.desktop3: Every move to/from Norway includes complimentary box loans, free rescheduling up to 24 hours before move day and a 14-day guarantee on cleaning services. Support gives concrete advice on driving distance, winter tyre requirements, toll roads, parking in Oslo, Bergen and Trondheim and how to handle Norwegian property rules and shared spaces.
about.mobile: Experienced teams for moves to/from Norway with fixed pricing and carefully planned logistics.
about.mobileExpanded: We plan around border crossings, tolls, winter conditions and narrow streets in Norwegian cities so that trucks, timings and access match your situation.
about.mobileExpanded2: One point of contact follows you from quote to move-in and helps with questions on route, schedule and moving into Norwegian properties.

experienceSection.title: Our experience with moves to and from Norway

experience.title: Our experience with moves to and from Norway
experience.description: We regularly move between Sweden and Norway – from apartments in Stockholm to homes in Oslo, Bergen and Trondheim. Our experience with the E6 route, the Svinesund bridge, winter driving and Norwegian toll systems means we can plan each move around distance, season and local conditions in both Swedish and Norwegian cities.
experience.expanded: For larger projects we often do digital or on-site reviews of both the Swedish and Norwegian addresses. We assess carry routes in older Oslo courtyards, driveways in steep hillside neighbourhoods and loading zones near fjordside areas. Experience from moves to everything from central Oslo apartments to houses in smaller Østlandet and Vestlandet towns means we know how much time is needed when weather, terrain and tolls affect the driving plan.

reviews.subtitle: Most recommended mover for moves to/from Norway
reviews.description: Reviews from customers who have moved to or from Norway highlight our clear communication on routes, timings and costs, and how we handle winter conditions, tolls and narrow Norwegian streets without compromising safety. Clients particularly value that we can explain the steps around border crossings, moving into Norwegian properties and how to plan a move where weather and terrain play a big role.

awards.title: Flyttella awards for moves to and from Norway
awards.description: Our awards for moves to and from Norway reflect our ability to combine careful planning with practical experience of driving in Norwegian conditions. Clients and partners especially highlight how we manage moves where the E6, the Svinesund bridge, mountain roads and narrow inner-city streets in Oslo and Bergen are part of the same assignment, without compromising punctuality or safe handling of belongings.

servicesSection.title: Discover all our services for moves to/from Norway
servicesSection.description: Household moves between Sweden and Norway, packing, storage, cleaning, assembly and advisory services for cross-border moves. We handle driving plans along the E6, any ferries, tolls, parking and logistics in both Swedish and Norwegian cities.

blogSection.title: Guides and tips for moving to/from Norway
blogSection.description: Plan your move around the season, check winter tyres and driving distance, factor in tolls and clarify in advance how loading and move-in work in your specific Norwegian area.

blog.title: Checklist: moving to/from Norway
blog.description: Review route and border crossing, ensure vehicles and tyres are suitable for the conditions, book loading zones in Oslo or other cities and check rules for shared courtyards and stairwells before move day.

processSection.title: Our process
processSection.subtitle: How it works
processSection.description: Our moving process is simple, transparent and safe: fill out the form, get a quote within a minute, get personal follow-up the same day and sign digitally when everything feels right. The quote is based on your actual conditions – distance, route via the border, season, living area, floors, elevator and parking distance – and can be supplemented with packing, cleaning or storage without hidden fees.

process.fillFormDesc: Describe addresses in Sweden and Norway, date, floors, elevator rules, parking and if basement/attic should be emptied. Specify desired additional services and whether the move is in winter or summer.
process.quickQuoteDesc: You get a fixed quote with clear scope where route, distance, any ferries and tolls are included. If inspection of the Norwegian address is needed we book it before finalizing the price.
process.signConfirmDesc: After signing we prepare a detailed driving plan, book loading zones where possible and ensure loading and unloading times fit both Swedish and Norwegian conditions.
process.personalContactDesc: Your coordinator keeps you updated on timings, weather, routes and gives tips on how to prepare belongings for transport in Norwegian conditions.
process.moveCompletedDesc: The team protects entrances, stairs and elevators, adjusts carry routes to terrain and makes sure your belongings end up in the right place in your new home in Norway or Sweden.
process.satisfiedCustomerDesc: We do a joint walkthrough, adjust furniture placement and ensure any follow-up services such as cleaning or storage follow the plan.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about moving to/from Norway

items.question: How do winter conditions and mountain roads affect my move to Norway?
items.answer: We plan routes and timings around the season, ensure vehicles and tyres are suitable for the conditions and add margin for weather. You get clear information on how this affects the schedule and price.

items.question: Do I need to think about tolls and border crossings?
items.answer: We include tolls and border crossings in the quote and explain how the costs are structured. You get a clear overview of the route and what is included before you approve the move.

items.question: Can you help with packing an entire home before moving to Norway?
items.answer: Yes, our packing teams label boxes by room, protect fragile items extra carefully and pack for longer distances and varying weather conditions between Sweden and Norway.

items.question: How does move-in work in Norwegian properties?
items.answer: We review gates, courtyards, stairwells and elevators in advance where possible and adapt crew size and equipment to the property's conditions – whether it's inner-city Oslo or smaller towns with steep terrain.

items.question: How far in advance should I book a move to/from Norway?
items.answer: For moves to and from Norway we recommend 4–6 weeks in advance, especially during winter or for larger projects. We always try to solve urgent requests where planning and route make it possible.
